rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §19.0052 governs an adult education pilot program in Windham School District. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: The Windham School District shall establish a pilot program under which one or more nonprofit entities provide an adult education program
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses adult education in correctional settings and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
